column2: Assessor Cannot Set Defensible RSM Requirements with Invalid or Incomplete SORA Evidence
column3: ['Set up a UAS operational authorization application for operations with robust safety measures. ', 'Provide the assessor with invalid or incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'Verify that the assessor reviews the provided invalid or incomplete swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'Have the assessor attempt to set RSM requirements based on the reviewed evidence. ']
column4: ['The application is set up and ready to use. ', 'The assessor has access to the specified evidence. ', 'The assessor confirms they have reviewed the evidence. ', 'The assessor attempts but fails to set defensible RSM requirements. ']
